cluster.title: Desktop Distribution — CLI, staging, smoke harness
cluster.summary: The no-installer distribution pipeline for the desktop app: the published `copilot` CLI (npm) stages a sha256-pinned CPython+Postgres+services runtime into the user's home, ad-hoc signs it on macOS, and launches Electron in production posture; tools/desktop-runtime is the shared staging engine (also driven by release CI) plus an executable boot-contract smoke; tools/cli-testing is a Playwright-Electron live-smoke harness with real SIWE sign-in. Well-crafted and supply-chain-careful, but weakened by hand-synced duplicate facts (Electron 42 vs 43 pin skew, mirrored SERVICES lists, drifted boot-contract copy) and a syntax-check-only test posture.

nodes.summary: `copilot` command dispatch: start/install/doctor/repair/uninstall/help/version, flag parsing, signal forwarding (win32 tree-kill).

paths.mjs (payload-vs-dev root + electron resolution, state dirs), stage.mjs (idempotent wrapper spawning the staging engine), launch.mjs (Electron spawn with COPILOT_RUNTIME_DIR/COPILOT_PRODUCTION), ui.mjs (TTY output).
doctor.mjs (install diagnosis + codesign spot-checks), repair.mjs (orphaned-postgres reclaim, session clear), uninstall.mjs (path-prefix process sweep + guarded rm -rf).
Branded macOS shell: CoW-clones Electron.app into ~/.0xcopilot/shell, rewrites Info.plist identity + icon, re-signs ad-hoc, stamp-cached; falls back to stock Electron on any failure.
assemble-payload.mjs (prepack: build desktop+frontend, mirror monorepo subset + stage tooling + Google OAuth default into payload/) and pack-manifest-check.mjs (build-free publish-manifest CI check).

Staging engine: downloads sha256-pinned python/postgres (manifest.json), extracts, per-service pip (--require-hashes + pin-check), prunes, compiles, stages wallet-page web assets, optional macOS ad-hoc signing; stamp-driven idempotence.

Executable boot contract: initdb → pg_ctl → create DBs via psycopg → migrate.py ×2 → three uvicorn services with per-run secrets → health/providers/dev-IdP-absent smoke → clean shutdown. Manual-only; mirrors (and has drifted from) the Electron supervisor.
Playwright-Electron driver launching the real app with CLI-identical env, intercepting shell.openExternal, exposing an HTTP /rpc control server for click/screenshot/DOM-dump steps.
Completes a real SIWE login against the live facade (nonce → viem-signed EIP-4361 → verify) and feeds the app's loopback; carries a third hand-copy of the SIWE message template.
User + operator docs: CLI README/TROUBLESHOOTING, desktop-runtime boot-contract README with sharp-edges list, cli-testing README + FIX-PLAN/FIX-VERIFICATION remediation record.

edges.label: paths/stage/launch/ui + mac-shell imports
doctor/repair/uninstall dispatch
ensureBrandedShell before launch
stageRuntime spawns node stage.mjs --platform --arch --dest --adhoc-sign
copies stage.mjs + manifest.json into payload/tools/desktop-runtime
reads staging-manifest.json; runs staged pg_ctl; codesign spot-checks staged binaries
requires staged tree + staging-manifest.json host_exec
captured openExternal loopback URL feeds siwe-session --loopback
spawn(electron, [appDir]) with COPILOT_RUNTIME_DIR + COPILOT_PRODUCTION=1
posture contract: COPILOT_PRODUCTION consumed by main/posture.ts; COPILOT_RUNTIME_DIR by boot-mode.ts
npm run build --workspace @0x-copilot/desktop; ships out/ bundle in payload/desktop
reads out/main/icon.icns; BUNDLE_ID mirrors branding.ts APP_ID / electron-builder appId
builds/stages apps/frontend/dist (wallet.html) -> <dest>/web for facade FACADE_WEB_DIST_DIR
stages services/backend {src,migrations,scripts} + hash-locked pip site-packages
stages services/backend-facade src + hash-locked pip site-packages
stages services/ai-backend {src,migrations,scripts,config,skills} + pip site-packages
pip installs packages/service-contracts + packages/audit-chain into each service's site-packages
downloads pinned python-build-standalone archives (sha256-verified)
downloads pinned zonky embedded-postgres jars (sha256-verified)
python -m uvicorn backend_app.desktop_app:app (production, single_user_desktop)
python -m uvicorn runtime_api.app:app (postgres store, in-proc worker, migrations off)
spawns backend_facade.app:app then smokes /v1/health, /v1/auth/providers, /v1/dev absence
staged initdb / pg_ctl / postgres lifecycle (embedded cluster)
playwright electron.launch([appDir]) with CLI-identical env; intercepts shell.openExternal
POST /v1/auth/siwe/nonce + /v1/auth/siwe/verify against the live supervised facade
EIP-4361 message template + 'Sign in to Copilot' statement must byte-match siwe.py (3rd copy)
GET app loopback /wallet/cb with bearer fields to sign the GUI in
release-desktop.yml runs stage.mjs per (platform,arch); caches ~/.cache/enterprise-desktop-runtime keyed on manifest.json
ci-cli.yml: node --check, version/help smoke, pack-manifest-check on 3 OSes
bundles default Google OAuth client (gitignored google-oauth.json or publish env) into payload
builds @0x-copilot/frontend and mirrors dist (wallet.html) into payload/apps/frontend/dist
